hero.subtitle: Tailor-made itineraries in Costa Rica. From the first call to your last day of travel.

process.title: Design your tailor-made experience
process.subtitle: A simple and transparent process to create your perfect trip to Costa Rica

step1.title: First Call
step1.description: We connect with you to learn about your tastes, the type of experiences you seek, desired activities, preferred accommodation, and your adventure and comfort level.

step2.title: Personalized Proposal
step2.description: We create a 100% customized itinerary draft adapted to your interests. We adjust it as many times as necessary until it's perfect.

step3.title: Experience Execution
step3.description: Once approved, we execute your trip on the agreed dates, guaranteeing an authentic, sustainable, and real experience.

map.title: Explore Costa Rica by Province
map.subtitle: Select the provinces you're interested in visiting and we'll design your ideal route

nocturnal.title: Night Hikes
nocturnal.description: Discover the wildlife that awakens when the sun goes down.

birds.title: Bird Watching
birds.description: Observe endemic species in their natural habitat.

waterfalls.title: Hidden Waterfalls
waterfalls.description: Explore pristine waterfalls in the middle of the jungle.

forest.title: Primary Forest
forest.description: Immerse yourself in millenary primary ecosystems.

inspiration.title: Inspiration for your trip
inspiration.subtitle: 7 themed experiences designed based on what travelers seek in Costa Rica

adventure.title: Extreme Adventure
adventure.description: Rafting, canopy, rappel and challenging hikes for adrenaline lovers.

wildlife.title: Wildlife
wildlife.description: Wildlife observation in Corcovado, Tortuguero and Monteverde.

wellness.title: Wellness & Nature
wellness.description: Yoga, natural spa, hot springs and meditation in the jungle.

family.title: Family Adventure
family.description: Educational and fun activities for the whole family.

romantic.title: Romantic Getaway
romantic.description: Paradise beaches, sunsets and private dinners.

culture.title: Culture & Tradition
culture.description: Typical towns, coffee, chocolate and local gastronomy.

photography.title: Nature Photography
photography.description: The best spots to capture Costa Rica's biodiversity.

footer.description: Personalized experiences in Costa Rica. We design your perfect adventure, step by step.
